title: Customs Tariff Value for Silver Imports Reduced by FinMin
content:
# Customs Tariff Value for Silver Imports Reduced by FinMin

Ek important update hai. Government ne silver imports ke liye customs tariff value reduce kiya hai. This move is generally aimed at aligning import values with global price trends and providing relief to stakeholders.

Here are the key details:
*   **What:** The customs tariff value for silver imports (in any form) has been reduced.
*   **Old Value:** Previously, the tariff value for silver was USD 2810 per kilogram.
*   **New Value:** The revised customs tariff value for silver has been fixed at USD 2455 per kilogram.
*   **Notification Details:** This change was announced via CBIC Notification No. 47/2026-Customs (N.T.) dated May 19, 2026.
*   **Effective Date:** The new tariff value came into effect from May 20, 2026.
*   **Impact:** A reduction in tariff value typically lowers the assessable value for customs duty calculation, which may offer some relief to importers and bullion traders.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 21 May 2026*
